title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
